body.input:
Assistant: STEP_OK

User: [T5c execute-tool-direct] Call the execute-tool endpoint with toolName='tool-help' and input={} and instanceId='hermes'. Check that the inner result contains a tools array with at least one entry. End your reply with STEP_OK if a tools list was returned, or FAILED: <reason> if the result was missing or malformed.

Assistant: STEP_OK

User: [T6a wakeUp-phase1] Call execute-tool with toolName='generate_image', instanceId='hermes', input={'prompt':'wakeup-test'}, callbackMode='wakeUp'. The image will be generated asynchronously. IMPORTANT: In this first phase you should receive a taskId with no imageUrl yet - end your reply with STEP_OK if you see taskId and no imageUrl, or FAILED: <reason> otherwise. ALSO IMPORTANT: You will be automatically revived when the image is ready. When revived (you will see the generate_image tool result containing an imageUrl), confirm the imageUrl is present and non-empty, then end with WAKEUP_OK. If revived but imageUrl is missing or empty, end with WAKEUP_FAILED: <reason>.
